Generated Narrative: ValueSet ACCESSMSKDiagnosisVS

This value set includes codes based on the following rules:

  • Include codes fromhttp://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where concept is-a M15 (Polyosteoarthritis)
  • Include codes fromhttp://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where concept is-a M16 (Osteoarthritis of hip)
  • Include codes fromhttp://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where concept is-a M17 (Osteoarthritis of knee)
  • Include codes fromhttp://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where concept is-a M18 (Osteoarthritis of first carpometacarpal joint)
  • Include codes fromhttp://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where concept is-a M19 (Other and unspecified osteoarthritis)
  • Include these codes as defined in http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server)

name: ACCESSMSKDiagnosisVS
title: ACCESS Musculoskeletal (MSK) Track Qualifying Diagnoses
description: This value set contains ICD-10-CM diagnosis codes that qualify a patient for the ACCESS Model Musculoskeletal (MSK) track. Includes osteoarthritis, other arthropathies and joint disorders, spine and structural disorders, degenerative spine disease, back pain and radiculopathy, soft tissue/tendon/bursa disorders, and peripheral nerve and plexus disorders.
copyright: This value set includes content from ICD-10-CM, which is copyright World Health Organization (WHO). ICD-10-CM codes are freely available in the public domain.
